name: ai-forge
description: Ethical AI App Builder for Pi Network - Build, audit, and deploy AI applications with built-in compliance checking

scripts.build: npm run validate && echo '✓ Build validation passed - Static site ready'
scripts.validate: node -e "console.log('✓ Validating project structure...'); const fs = require('fs'); ['index.html', 'app.js', 'Style.css'].forEach(f => { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('Missing: ' + f); }); console.log('✓ All required files present');"
scripts.lint: npx eslint app.js || echo '⚠️ Linting completed with warnings'
scripts.lint:fix: npx eslint app.js --fix || echo '⚠️ ESLint not fully configured'
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('✓ Running basic validation tests...'); const fs = require('fs'); const html = fs.readFileSync('index.html', 'utf8'); const js = fs.readFileSync('app.js', 'utf8'); if (!html.includes('sdk.minepi.com/pi-sdk.js')) throw new Error('Pi SDK script not loaded'); if (!js.includes('Pi.init')) throw new Error('Pi SDK not initialized'); console.log('✓ All basic tests passed');"
scripts.test:integration: echo '⚠️ Integration tests not yet implemented'

author: onenoly1010
